name: New Module Request

---

## Module ID
`agent/modules/<module-id>/`

## Permission Level
- [ ] READ
- [ ] SUGGEST
- [ ] WRITE
- [ ] EXECUTE

## Phase
Phase N

## What this module does
(describe capability)

## Vendor / External System
Name:
API documentation:
Auth method:

## Prerequisites
- [ ] Declared in `docs/AGENT.md` module registry
- [ ] Previous vendor modules stable in prod for 30+ days (PP-MD-03) — if WRITE/EXECUTE
- [ ] Token created with read-only scope
- [ ] Token registered in inventory
- [ ] Authorization note included (who approved this capability expansion)
